name: scratchtml
description: Share and review any document Claude generates — reports, implementation plans, designs, mockups — on scratchtml's ephemeral, commentable links, with an automatic plan-mode review loop.

plugins.name: scratchtml
plugins.description: Share and review any document — reports, plans, designs, mockups — on scratchtml's ephemeral, commentable links, with an automatic plan-mode review loop before exiting plan mode.
